subject: A large elk in a misty enchanted forest, antlers dripping glowing fire-droplets
description: A powerful elk stands in a dim, misty woodland, head turned slightly as it bellows or sniffs the air. Its large branching antlers drip glowing orange-red fire droplets, and the same droplets fall from the gnarled tree branches above. The forest floor and surrounding trees are rendered in muted grey-greens and blues, with the fire-drops providing the only warm light source. The atmosphere is eerie and magical. The flavor text (Rowan Kenrith asking 'Is that one Dad?') and the card's bestow mechanic stripping creature abilities are strong Oko indicators — Oko, the shapeshifting trickster planeswalker, is canonically associated with transforming others into elk.
foreground: Large elk with branching antlers, fire-droplets dripping from antlers
background: Misty gnarled forest, falling fire-drop orbs
emotion: powerful and unsettling; the beast seems aware of an observer
